query: Set up a new Cloudflare Worker project with wrangler.toml configured for KV namespace binding called CACHE and a D1 database binding called DB. Include staging and production environments.
My worker keeps throwing 'ReferenceError: Buffer is not defined' when I try to use crypto.createHash. How do I handle this in the Workers V8 runtime?
Implement a CORS middleware for our Cloudflare Worker API. It needs to handle preflight OPTIONS requests and add Access-Control-Allow-Origin headers for our frontend at app.example.com.
Create a scheduled worker with cron triggers that runs every hour to clean expired entries from our KV store and daily at midnight to generate a report and store it in R2.

I need to set up R2 object storage for user-uploaded profile pictures. The worker should accept POST with multipart form data, validate file type/size, and store in the AVATARS R2 bucket with a UUID key.
Implement a Durable Object counter that tracks active WebSocket connections for our real-time collaboration feature. Each document gets its own Durable Object instance.
Our worker bundle is 1.2MB and exceeding the free plan limit. How do I tree-shake the dependencies and check bundle size before deploying? We're importing lodash and moment.

Set up D1 database migrations for our worker. I need to create a users table with id, email, name, created_at columns and a sessions table with foreign key to users. Show the SQL and wrangler migration commands.
I need to implement Cache API in my worker to cache expensive API responses for 1 hour. The cache key should be based on the request URL and the response should include proper Cache-Control headers.
Deploy our worker to staging first with 'bunx wrangler deploy --env staging' and set the API_KEY and DATABASE_URL secrets for the staging environment using wrangler secret.
Set up a Cloudflare Pages project for our static marketing site with a custom domain. We need redirects for old URLs and custom 404 page.
Configure our Next.js app to deploy on Vercel with edge runtime. We need ISR with 60 second revalidation for our product pages.
I need to set up a reverse proxy with Nginx that routes /api/* requests to our Node.js backend and serves static files for everything else.
Implement server-side rendering for our TanStack Start app. The server function needs to fetch data from our PostgreSQL database before rendering the page.
Set up Cloudflare DNS records for our domain. We need an A record for the root domain and a CNAME for the www subdomain pointing to our hosting provider.
Build a REST API using ElysiaJS with rate limiting, authentication middleware, and PostgreSQL database integration using Drizzle ORM.
I need to set up a CDN for our images and static assets. Configure Cloudflare's CDN caching rules with custom page rules for different content types.
Implement a WebSocket server using Node.js ws library for real-time chat. It needs authentication, rooms, and message history stored in Redis.
Configure Cloudflare WAF rules to block suspicious traffic patterns and rate limit login attempts to our /auth/login endpoint.
Set up a service worker for offline caching of our PWA. It should cache app shell files and use a stale-while-revalidate strategy for API responses.
